overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Ghost of Tsushima featuring a samurai warrior traversing an autumn landscape. The character walks through a golden birch forest transitioning to open grasslands and finally reaching a river bank, with dynamic weather shifting from overcast to clear skies and distant smoke becoming visible.

scene_state.functional_zone: autumn birch forest with dense undergrowth

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through tall grass between golden-leaved birch trees, surveying the forest surroundings

entered.detail: dense stand of birch trees with bright yellow autumn foliage
misty mountains visible through the tree canopy
tall green grass and ferns covering the forest floor

segments.scene_description: The samurai character walks through a dense autumn forest with golden birch trees and lush undergrowth. The sky is partially visible through the canopy, creating diffused natural lighting. The environment is serene and empty of other characters.

scene_state.functional_zone: open grassland with white wildflowers approaching river valley

events.description: clouds part and lighting shifts from overcast to bright direct sunlight
black smoke plume becomes visible rising in the distance

agents.ego_description: continuing forward through open fields, passing a wooden signpost while approaching a distant river

entered.detail: small wooden sign on a post marking the trail
patches of white flowers mixed with tall grass
thick black smoke rising from behind the distant tree line
calm blue river visible in the valley ahead

segments.scene_description: The character emerges from the forest into an open grassland filled with white wildflowers. The sky clears to bright blue, revealing a distant river and a concerning black smoke plume rising on the horizon. A wooden trail signpost stands to the right as the terrain opens up.

scene_state.functional_zone: river bank with calm water and distant smoke

events.description: reaches the river bank and location discovery text appears

agents.ego_description: approaching the water's edge while observing the distant smoke across the river

entered.detail: dark green forested hills on the opposite bank

segments.scene_description: The character arrives at the bank of the Forgotten River, with clear blue water flowing calmly. The black smoke continues to rise in the distance across the river, and the landscape opens to reveal forested hillsides. The lighting is bright and clear as the character stops at the water's edge.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement as a samurai traverses a serene autumn forest that gradually opens into a bright, expansive river valley. It begins within a dense grove of golden birch trees and lush undergrowth under a canopy of diffused natural light. As the character emerges from the woods, the scene expands into an open grassland filled with white wildflowers while the sky clears to a bright blue, revealing a wooden signpost and a distant plume of black smoke on the horizon. The camera then follows the path toward the bank of the Forgotten River, where the terrain opens further to reveal forested hillsides. Finally, the movement concludes at the water's edge, with the clear blue river flowing calmly beneath a bright sky as the smoke continues to rise in the distance.
